body_txt: Alice and Bob went through the whole Romance Arc . They started out as Just Friends . They developed some Unresolved Sexual Tension . Then the two shared their First Kiss and it was magical. Alice and Bob were on the road to Happily Ever After (or at least Happily Married ). But that was all a long time ago. Now they're the couple who sit silently across from each other at the restaurant, eating quiet and perfunctory dinners. They rarely spend time together and the sex is rote (assuming they even have sex anymore ). Alice finds herself noticing that Charlie is looking especially good lately and wonders what it would be like to kiss him. All the little quirks Bob found endearing about Alice now drive him up the wall. Maybe there was passion here once, but now there's nothing but Dead Sparks . Unfortunately, this is often Truth in Television . In rare cases, if a relationship is brought back to life, it's Rekindled Sparks . Compare No Accounting for Taste , No Sparks , Awful Wedded Life ; Contrast Happily Married and True Love Is a Kink .
